name: claw-memory
description: Local semantic memory for Codex: auto-distills sessions, injects relevant past context via hooks, and searches raw Codex + Claude Code transcripts. sqlite-vec + local embeddings, no daemon, no Python.

interface.shortDescription: Local semantic memory + transcript search for Codex
interface.longDescription: Auto-distills finished sessions into a local sqlite-vec store, injects relevant preferences and past-conversation context at session start via hooks, and exposes memory_recall / memory_search / memory_search_logs MCP tools. Runs fully local with Xenova e5 embeddings — no daemon, no Python.
